diagrams.title: ER Diagram Basic Symbols
diagrams.description: Standard notation symbols used in Entity-Relationship diagrams
diagrams.purpose: Learn standard ER diagram notation symbols for identifying entities, attributes, and relationships

diagrams.title: Entity Type vs Entity Set
diagrams.description: Visual comparison showing the relationship between entity type (blueprint) and entity set (collection)
elements: STUDENT Entity Type box with attributes
Collection of actual student records showing they form entity set
diagrams.purpose: Understand that entity type defines structure while entity set contains actual instances at a point in time

diagrams.title: Cardinality Types
diagrams.description: Three types of cardinality relationships shown with crow's foot notation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how different cardinality ratios are represented in ER diagrams

diagrams.title: Participation Constraints
diagrams.description: Total vs Partial participation shown with line types
diagrams.purpose: Understand how optional vs mandatory relationships are depicted in ER diagrams
